title: The Sunken Temple
description: A flooded ruin beneath the marshlands holds treasures and dangers in equal measure. The water is rising.

title: The Whispering Keep
description: A ruined fortress on the northern moors glows at night and the nearby village cannot sleep. You have been hired to silence the whispers before the harvest moon.

title: The Queen's Cipher
description: A forged invitation and a dangerous secret are your only weapons in the royal palace. The spymaster's eyes are everywhere, and time is running out.

title: Tides of Fortune
description: Your ship has broken apart on a wild coast and the storm is not finished with you. Survival is one thing - finding a way home is another.

title: The Hollow Bell
description: The old chapel bell rings at midnight though no one pulls the rope. The village priest has vanished and the townsfolk will not go near the graveyard after dark.

title: The Gilded Vault
description: The merchant prince keeps a stolen relic locked beneath his manor. Tonight, during the masquerade, is your only chance to take it back.

title: The Thornwick Exchange
description: A locked box arrives on your doorstep the same morning you owe a guild debt by nightfall. In Thornwick Market, every buyer has their price - but not every seller knows theirs.

title: The Last Lantern
description: A storm drives you through the door of a roadside inn already heavy with tension. Sergeant Vorn and his soldiers are hunting someone, and that someone just pressed a note into your hand.

title: The Barrow of Mordavain
description: The lich Mordavain has slept in his sealed barrow for four centuries and no treasure hunter who has entered has ever returned. You are carrying better information than the others. That may or may not be enough.

title: Beneath Bloodstone
description: A cell beneath a dark temple. The chanting above grows louder and midnight is close. You have one chance to escape before the ritual begins.

title: The Frozen Pass
description: A blizzard traps you on Greymount Pass with night falling fast. Every choice could mean warmth or a cold grave.

title: The Iron Door Below
description: An ancient dwarven mine has been sealed for centuries. The merchant guild offers a fortune to whoever maps its depths, but the door was sealed for a reason.

title: The Wyvern's Terms
description: A wyvern has claimed the mountain pass and the kingdom's trade road lies silent. You carry a diplomat's seal and orders to negotiate, not fight.

title: The Copper Flagon
description: A silver locket has vanished from behind the bar of a crossroads inn. Five guests, one thief, and a long rainy night to sort the truth from the lies.

title: The Greenwood Truce
description: Two feuding noble houses are trapped in a sealed forest with a shadow-beast on the prowl. You are the only neutral voice in the wood.

title: The Storm Tower
description: A sorcerer's tower only appears during thunderstorms. Your crew has one night to climb it, steal the Heartstone, and escape before the lightning stops.

title: The Minstrel's Wager
description: A traveling minstrel challenges you to a contest of wits in a rowdy tavern. The stakes are higher than they seem and every patron has an opinion.

title: The Pale Garden
description: A vast fungal cavern pulses with bioluminescent light beneath the Greymoor Hills. The herbalist who entered three days ago has not returned, and the glow is spreading to the surface.

title: The Broken Oath
description: Two rival mercenary captains both claim your sworn service in a border town too small for their feud. Night is falling and steel is being drawn.

title: The Grayhollow Hunt
description: A beast stalks the farmsteads around Grayhollow village. The hunters who went after it came back changed. Now it is your turn to enter the fog.

title: The Iron Cradle
description: You wake in a dungeon cell with no memory of your crime. The guards are gone, the torches are dying, and somewhere below the floor something is digging upward.

title: The Festival Crown
description: A golden crown lies hidden somewhere in the town of Harthmere during the annual Harvest Festival. Every treasure hunter in the region has come to find it first.

title: The Siege of Redwall
description: A goblin horde surrounds the border fort of Redwall and the garrison is half strength. You must hold the walls until dawn or the entire valley falls.

title: Test Story
description: A minimal test story with one passage and two endings.
